overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight or headlamp. The camera moves steadily along a narrow dirt path between a tall rock cliff formation on the right and dense forest vegetation on the left, consistent with horror or exploration game engine footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail between rock cliff and tree line

dense dark trees and underbrush forming the forest boundary
dirt trail covered with brown fallen leaves and small debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark nighttime forest trail illuminated by a warm flashlight. The camera moves forward along a narrow dirt path covered in autumn leaves, with a massive rock cliff face dominating the right side and dense forest trees visible in the darkness on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with close rock wall and encroaching vegetation

events.description: forest vegetation on left becomes denser and closer to the trail path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail, passing closer to the rock wall on the right

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the trail, the rock cliff face remains prominent on the right while the forest trees on the left grow closer and more detailed. The path remains narrow and dark, with the flashlight illuminating the textured rock surface and the encroaching vegetation as the camera progresses deeper into the forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark forest trail that grows increasingly enclosed as the camera pushes deeper into the woods. It begins on a narrow dirt path blanketed in autumn leaves, where a warm flashlight beam cuts through the night to reveal a massive rock cliff face on the right. As the camera progresses, the light catches the rough textures of the cliff wall while the dense forest trees on the left begin to loom closer. The scene then shifts as the vegetation encroaches further upon the path, narrowing the field of vision and intensifying the sense of isolation. Finally, the flashlight illuminates the tightening corridor between the towering stone and the thickening woods as the journey continues into the darkness.
